sig_a.subject: free filing claim
sig_a.rationale: Marketing material claims free filing without disclosing material limitations, conditions, or applicable fees that may apply.

sig_b.subject: free tax filing eligibility qualification
sig_b.rationale: Marketing claims free filing availability without disclosing specific eligibility criteria or limitations that restrict access to the stated percentage of taxpayers.

verdict.label: Free filing claim missing eligibility disclosure
verdict.rationale: Both clusters involve the same underlying compliance failure: making a "free filing" claim without adequately disclosing eligibility limitations. Cluster 1 makes an unqualified free claim; Cluster 2 acknowledges eligibility but fails to disclose it prominently with the claim. Same obligation, same product, same failure mode.

sig_a.subject: $50 bonus offer
sig_a.rationale: Bonus amount is stated but specific terms and conditions are not disclosed, only referenced generically.

sig_b.subject: referral bonus offer terms
sig_b.rationale: Bonus offer lacks required terms such as minimum deposit amount, eligibility conditions, or timing restrictions.

verdict.label: Missing bonus offer terms and conditions
verdict.rationale: Both clusters involve bonus offers ($50 and $25 referral) that lack required terms and conditions disclosure. They represent the same compliance failure under Rule R-04: incomplete bonus offer messaging that fails to clearly disclose material terms.
